summary: Show Recycled Project Action Plan Template Reference
description: Returns a Recycled Project Action Plan Template Reference

schema.description: Recycled Project Action Plan Template Reference (Show)

plan_template_item_id.description: ID of the associated Project Action Plan Template Item

created_at.description: Time the Project Action Plan Template Reference was created

deleted_at.description: Time the Project Action Plan Template Reference was deleted

payload.description: Contains specific attributes depending on the type of Reference

drawing_id.description: ID of the Drawing the Drawing Revision belongs to

drawing_revision_id.description: ID of the latest Drawing Revision of the Drawing

file_version_id.description: ID of the latest File Version of the Folder File

folder_id.description: ID of the Folder File the File Version belongs to

specification_section_current_revision_i.description: Current Revision ID of a Specification Section

type.description: Project Action Plan Template Reference Type

updated_at.description: Time the Recycled Project Action Plan Template Reference was updated
